name: Kripa Agarwal

about.heading: What I do
about.text: Software Engineer at LTM with a strong foundation in Computer Science and full-stack development. Skilled in React, JavaScript, Java, SQL, and Python, with solid expertise in OOP, DSA, and distributed systems. Experienced in building scalable, high-performance enterprise applications while ensuring code quality and usability. Strong collaborator with analytical problem-solving abilities and exposure to cloud, AI, and ML. Passionate about continuous learning and delivering impactful, value-driven solutions.

Developed engaging lesson plans and simplified complex topics for better understanding

Coordinated with editorial team to maintain accuracy and readability of published work
Head of Content Creation Team, later promoted to President
Introduced student-driven initiatives (events, competitions), engaging 300+ participants
